name: Plastic Lazy Susan Turn Table 11" - Brightroom™: Clear Pantry & Cabinet Organizer
description:
Easily store everything from soup to nuts with the 11-Inch Plastic Turntable from Brightroom™. You can keep kitchen staples neatly stored and easy to find with this clear plastic turntable. The sections are ideal for organizing condiments in the refrigerator, or canned goods and spices in the pantry, and you can also use this turntable to maximize cabinet, counter and corner space in your kitchen. Plus, the non-slip surface keeps this handy turntable in place while rotating, making your time in the kitchen simpler and more fun.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.
